headline: PEPSI® GLOBAL LAUNCHES PEPSI 'HOUSE OF TREATS' A NEW AWAY FROM HOME EXPERIENTIAL BEVERAGE PLATFORM
summary: Pepsi® Global has launched Pepsi "House of Treats", a new crafted beverages platform designed to deliver experience-first drinks across key Away From Home channels this year. Tapping into consumer demand for beverage customisation, flavour exploration and "treatanomics", the platform offers multisensorial beverages exclusively through select PepsiCo entertainment and hospitality partners.

content.title: PEPSI® GLOBAL LAUNCHES PEPSI 'HOUSE OF TREATS' A NEW AWAY FROM HOME EXPERIENTIAL BEVERAGE PLATFORM
content.summary: Pepsi® Global has launched Pepsi "House of Treats", a new crafted beverages platform designed to deliver experience-first drinks across key Away From Home channels this year. Tapping into consumer demand for beverage customisation, flavour exploration and "treatanomics", the platform offers multisensorial beverages exclusively through select PepsiCo entertainment and hospitality partners.

thumbnail.caption: Pepsi “House of Treats” will begin rolling out from June 2026, debuting a diverse menu of crafted drinks spanning distinct flavour profiles including Yuzu Lychee and White Peach Sangria.
